data.name: Sweet Shop
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Shop - 一款以甜蜜玩具商店為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，五位漂亮可愛的玩具女孩到商店的日常，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女神的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度 2x2、2x4、4x4 難度的拼圖

- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖

- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。

- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

* 拼圖圖片大小為 800x960 px

* 畫廊圖片大小為 1088x960 px

data.short_description: Sweet Shop - 一款以甜蜜玩具商店為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，五位漂亮可愛的玩具女孩到商店的日常，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女神的照片。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Shop
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Shop - A simple and aesthetically pleasing puzzle game set in a sweet toy shop. It depicts the daily lives of five beautiful and adorable toy girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view their photos in the gallery.

- The game offers three puzzle difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, and 4x4.

- Press the "F" key to switch to black and white while solving a puzzle.

- Press the "Space" key to complete the puzzle.

- In the gallery, quickly scroll through the girls' photos by pressing the A, D, or left/right mouse buttons.

* Puzzle image size is 800x960 px

* Gallery image size is 1088x960 px
